chron.educate_aldren: {actor} invested house wealth in Aldren's education.
chron.marriage_velor: House Arven sealed a marriage pact with wealthy House Velor.
chron.marriage_cardin: House Arven sealed a marriage pact with steady House Cardin.
chron.investigate_secret: {actor} uncovered a secret that Beric would pay dearly to bury.
chron.reorganize_estate: {actor} squeezed new income from the estate, straining the household.
chron.reconcile_brothers: {actor} pressed Aldren and Rowen toward reconciliation.
chron.declare_aldren: Edric publicly declared Aldren the rightful heir of House Arven.
chron.declare_rowen: Edric publicly declared Rowen the heir, passing over the elder son.
chron.debt_pay_now: House Arven paid its creditors in full and in view of all.
chron.debt_defer: House Arven deferred its debts, and its standing suffered.
chron.debt_velor: House Velor settled part of Arven's debts — and remembered the favor.
chron.brothers_conflict_avoided: The brothers kept an uneasy peace, and no quarrel broke out.
chron.conflict_support_aldren: Edric took Aldren's side in the brothers' quarrel.
chron.conflict_support_rowen: Edric took Rowen's side in the brothers' quarrel.
chron.conflict_force_reconciliation: Edric forced his quarreling sons to make peace before witnesses.
chron.edric_death: Edric Arven died after a long illness.
chron.succession_stable_aldren: Aldren inherited the house with the family's firm consent.
chron.succession_unstable_aldren: Aldren inherited the house, but Rowen and Beric rejected a stable settlement.
chron.succession_agreed_rowen: Rowen inherited the house by agreement, though tongues wagged.
chron.succession_contested_rowen: Rowen seized the succession over bitter protest.
chron.succession_succession_civil_war: The succession shattered House Arven into open civil war.
chron.civil_buy_settlement: {actor} bought peace within the house with hard silver.
chron.civil_power_share: {actor} shared power to end the family war.
chron.civil_refuse_won: {actor} refused all compromise and broke the rival claim.
chron.civil_refuse_lost: {actor} refused compromise — and the estate was lost in the struggle.
chron.velor_recognize: House Arven recognized part of Velor's claim upon the estate.
chron.velor_compensate: House Arven paid House Velor to withdraw its claim.
chron.velor_reject: House Arven rejected Velor's claim outright.
chron.regency_accept: Beric was accepted as regent over the young head.
chron.regency_reject: The house rejected Beric's demand for regency.
chron.regency_secret: {actor} used Beric's secret to silence his regency demand.
chron.brother_share_income: {actor} granted the losing brother a share of estate income.
chron.brother_court_office: {actor} granted the losing brother a court office.
chron.cardin_mediation: House Cardin mediated quietly among the Arven kin.
chron.quiet_consolidation: The new head consolidated the house in relative quiet.
chron.claimant_departure: {actor} abandoned House Arven, taking loyal retainers along.
chron.kin_revolt: Discontented kin revolted against the head of the house.
chron.tax_resistance: Tenants resisted the house's levies, and collections faltered.
chron.estate_success: The estate prospered under steady management.
chron.pressure_concede: House Arven conceded revenue to House Velor's demands.
chron.pressure_resist: House Arven resisted Velor's pressure through court politics.
chron.pressure_fail: House Arven failed to answer Velor — and the estate changed hands.
chron.terminal_victory_stable_succession: House Arven emerged from the last winter unified and secure.
chron.terminal_victory_fragile_survival: House Arven survived the last winter, though its wounds remain.
chron.terminal_victory_blood_bought: House Arven survived — a survival bought with family blood.
chron.terminal_defeat_no_eligible_heir: The Arven line was left without an eligible heir.
chron.terminal_defeat_estate_lost: House Arven lost its last estate and its place among the houses.
chron.terminal_defeat_insolvent: House Arven collapsed under debts it could never repay.
chron.terminal_defeat_legitimacy_collaps: No one any longer recognized the authority of House Arven.
chron.terminal_defeat_unresolved_civil_w: The Arven civil war consumed the house entirely.
reason.no_action_points: No action points remain this turn.
reason.marriage_done: A marriage pact has already been made.
reason.declaration_used: The heir has already been formally declared.
reason.need_velor_marriage: Requires a marriage pact with House Velor.
reason.not_event_phase: No event is awaiting a decision.
upcoming.brothers_conflict: The brothers' rivalry may break into open conflict.
upcoming.edric_death: Edric's illness is mortal. He will not live past this turn.
upcoming.post_succession: The new order of the house will be tested.
upcoming.regime_test: The head's regime will face its trial.
upcoming.final_judgment: The fate of House Arven will be judged.
action.educate_aldren.title: Tutor Aldren
action.educate_aldren.desc: Cost: 1 action, 5 wealth. Aldren ability +8, legal claim +3, Edric–Aldren bond +5. Requires Edric alive.
action.educate_rowen.title: Train Rowen
action.educate_rowen.desc: Cost: 1 action, 5 wealth. Rowen ability +6, loyalty +4, ambition +3; Aldren–Rowen bond −3. Requires Edric alive.
action.appease_beric.title: Appease Beric
action.appease_beric.desc: Cost: 1 action, 8 wealth. Beric loyalty +12, cohesion +6, influence −2.
action.negotiate_marriage.title: Negotiate a Marriage
action.negotiate_marriage.desc: Cost: 1 action, 5 wealth. Bind the house to Velor or Cardin. Once per game.
action.investigate_secret.title: Investigate Beric's Secret
action.investigate_secret.desc: Cost: 1 action, 6 wealth. Uncover Beric's secret; his regard for the head −5.
action.reorganize_estate.title: Reorganize the Estate
action.reconcile_brothers.title: Reconcile the Brothers
action.reconcile_brothers.desc: Cost: 1 action, 5 influence. Aldren–Rowen bond +10, cohesion +4, Rowen ambition −2.
action.declare_heir.title: Declare the Heir
action.declare_heir.desc: Cost: 1 action, 10 influence. Publicly name Aldren or Rowen as heir. Once per game.
option.negotiate_marriage.house_velor.de: Wealth +20, influence +15, legitimacy +5 — but Velor gains a foothold in Arven affairs.
option.negotiate_marriage.house_cardin.d: Influence +8, cohesion +8, succession stability +5. Modest, and safe.
option.declare_heir.aldren_arven.title: Declare Aldren
option.declare_heir.aldren_arven.desc: Aldren claim +10, stability +8; Rowen loyalty −8, Beric loyalty −5.
option.declare_heir.rowen_arven.title: Declare Rowen
option.declare_heir.rowen_arven.desc: Rowen claim +15, stability −5; Aldren loyalty −12, Myra loyalty −10, Beric loyalty +10.
event.debt_demand.title: The Creditors' Demand
event.debt_demand.desc: Old debts have come due. The creditors' agent waits in the hall, and the household watches how the house answers.
event.debt_demand.stakes: Wealth, standing, and the house's freedom from outside leverage.
event.debt_demand.pos.0: The debt is mine to answer while I still breathe. But every coin spent now is a coin not spent on the succession.
event.debt_demand.pos.1: Do not mortgage the boys' future to buy a quiet season. Pay honestly if we can.
choice.debt_demand:pay_now.title: Pay now
choice.debt_demand:defer.title: Defer payment
choice.debt_demand:velor_support.title: Request Velor support
choice.debt_demand:velor_support.desc: Debt −10, succession stability −3; Velor's leverage grows.
event.brothers_conflict.title: The Brothers' Quarrel
event.brothers_conflict.desc: The rivalry between Aldren and Rowen has broken into an open quarrel before the household. Edric must answer it now.
event.brothers_conflict.stakes: The brothers' claims, the family's loyalties, and the shape of the succession.
event.brothers_conflict.pos.0: I am the elder and the named heir. Father must say so, plainly, before everyone.
event.brothers_conflict.pos.1: Being born first is not a virtue. Let father judge us by what we can do.
event.brothers_conflict.pos.2: Whichever son I favor, I wound the other — and winter is coming for me.
Aldren claim +5; Rowen loyalty −8, Beric loyalty −5.
choice.brothers_conflict:support_rowen.d: Rowen ability +5; Aldren loyalty −8, Myra loyalty −5.
event.decisive_civil_conflict.title: The House at War
event.decisive_civil_conflict.desc: The succession has split House Arven into armed camps. This turn, the war must end — by settlement, by division of power, or by force.
event.decisive_civil_conflict.stakes: The estate itself, and whether the house survives as one family.
event.decisive_civil_conflict.pos.0: The house is mine by the reckoning of the succession. I would rather buy peace than bury kin — but I will not yield.
event.decisive_civil_conflict.pos.1: Half the household stands with me. Offer me my due, or take your chances in the field.
event.decisive_civil_conflict.pos.2: Every day of this war, the neighbors circle closer. End it, one way or another.
choice.decisive_civil_conflict:buy_settl: Wealth −20; cohesion +15, legitimacy +5, the claimant's loyalty +10. The war ends.
choice.decisive_civil_conflict:power_sha: Influence −10; cohesion +10, stability +8, the claimant's ambition +8. The war ends.
choice.decisive_civil_conflict:refuse.de: Cohesion −10, legitimacy −10. The stronger claim prevails — defeat means losing the estate.
event.velor_estate_claim.title: Velor's Claim on the Estate
event.velor_estate_claim.desc: House Velor invokes the marriage pact to claim rights over the Arven estate while the succession is still unsteady.
event.velor_estate_claim.stakes: Legitimacy, the estate's independence, and Velor's future leverage.
event.velor_estate_claim.pos.0: The pact bought their silver, and now they present the bill. I must answer without losing the house.
choice.velor_estate_claim:reject.title: Reject the claim
event.beric_regency_demand.title: Beric Demands the Regency
event.beric_regency_demand.desc: The head of the house is young, and Beric demands to rule as regent until they come of age.
event.beric_regency_demand.stakes: Who truly governs House Arven, and at what price in loyalty.
event.beric_regency_demand.pos.0: A child cannot hold this house through what is coming. Give me the regency, and I will hold it.
event.beric_regency_demand.pos.1: My uncle offers his hand — and means to close it around the house.
choice.beric_regency_demand:accept.title: Accept the regency
choice.beric_regency_demand:accept.desc: Stability +10, Beric loyalty +10; influence −5. Beric rules in your name.
choice.beric_regency_demand:reject.title: Reject the regency
choice.beric_regency_demand:use_secret.d: Beric withdraws. Beric loyalty −10, influence −5, cohesion −5.
event.losing_brother_demand.title: The Losing Brother's Demand
event.losing_brother_demand.desc: The brother who lost the succession demands recognition worthy of his blood — income, office, or honor.
event.losing_brother_demand.stakes: The loser's loyalty, the house's coffers, and the peace of the family.
event.losing_brother_demand.pos.0: I accepted the outcome. I will not accept being nothing. Give me a place worthy of my name.
event.losing_brother_demand.pos.1: Every concession is a precedent — and every refusal is a wound. I must weigh which the house can afford.
event.velor_pressure.title: Velor Turns the Screw
event.velor_pressure.desc: House Velor presses its leverage over House Arven and demands satisfaction. Silence will be read as surrender.
event.velor_pressure.stakes: Revenue, standing — or the estate itself if the house fails to answer.
event.velor_pressure.pos.0: Velor wants an answer, not excuses. What I concede now, I concede forever — and what I ignore may cost the estate.
choice.velor_pressure:resist.title: Resist politically
choice.velor_pressure:fail_to_answer.des: The estate is forfeit to Velor.
ui.title: DYNASTY
ui.subtitle: THE LAST WINTER
ui.tagline: Twelve turns. One death foretold. Keep House Arven alive.
focus.no_marriage: No marriage alliance has been made.
focus.secret_known: Beric's secret is known to you.
focus.declaration_used: The heir declaration has been spent.
focus.velor_risk: House Velor holds leverage over the house.
focus.civil_war_active: CIVIL WAR — the house is at war with itself.
focus.edric_countdown: Edric will die on turn 6. Prepare the succession.
council.title: Family Council
council.hint: Council decisions cost no action points, but their consequences endure.
succ.title: The Succession of House Arven
succ.death_line: Edric Arven is dead. The house must pass to a new head — now, in the depth of its weakness.
succ.beric.loyal: Beric stood loyally behind the house (+5 succession stability).
succ.beric.hostile_hidden: Beric schemed unchecked for Rowen (Rowen +10, stability −10).
succ.beric.hostile_checked: Beric schemed for Rowen, restrained by his secret (Rowen +5, stability −5).
succ.beric.none: Beric watched, and did nothing decisive.
succ.tiebreaker: The scores were equal — the tie was broken by {rule}.
gen.title: Genealogy of House Arven
gen.badge.head: HEAD
gen.marriage_line: House Arven is bound by marriage to {name}.
gen.marriage_none: House Arven has made no marriage alliance.
end.no_succession: The house fell before the succession was resolved.
result.victory_stable_succession.title: A Dynasty Secured
result.victory_stable_succession.desc: The house passed through the last winter unified, solvent, and recognized. The Arven line will endure.
result.victory_fragile_survival.title: A Fragile Survival
result.victory_fragile_survival.desc: House Arven survives — poorer, wearier, its wounds unhealed. But it survives.
result.victory_blood_bought.title: Peace, Bought with Blood
result.victory_blood_bought.desc: The house tore itself apart and was stitched back together. What survived the civil war is still a family — barely.
result.defeat_no_eligible_heir.title: The Line Extinguished
result.defeat_no_eligible_heir.desc: No eligible heir remains to carry the Arven name. The house dies with its head.
result.defeat_estate_lost.title: The Estate Lost
result.defeat_estate_lost.desc: The last Arven estate has passed into other hands. A house without land is no house at all.
result.defeat_insolvent.title: Ruined by Debt
result.defeat_insolvent.desc: The creditors have taken everything. House Arven ends not with a sword, but with a ledger.
result.defeat_legitimacy_collapse.title: Authority Collapsed
result.defeat_legitimacy_collapse.desc: No oath, no deference, no recognition remains. The house exists only in name.
result.defeat_unresolved_civil_war.title: Consumed by Civil War
result.defeat_unresolved_civil_war.desc: The family war was never settled, and it devoured the house whole.
end.replay_hint: Another strategy might have ended differently. The winter can be survived — or won.
ui.new_campaign_hint: A three-generation campaign: rights, memories, and rank persist across successions.
ui.no_memories: No living memory weighs on the house.
rank.tribute_recovery: a heavy tribute to the crown
rank.royal_disfavor: royal disfavor after a refused levy
action.educate.title: Educate a Child
action.educate.desc: Spend 5 wealth to tutor a child: ability +7, claim +2.
action.arrange_marriage.title: Arrange a Marriage
action.arrange_marriage.desc: Spend 6 wealth to wed kin into an allied house. Houses differ in dowry and obligation.
action.appease.title: Appease Kin
action.appease.desc: Spend 8 wealth to soothe a discontented family member: loyalty +12.
action.court_favor.title: Court Royal Favor
action.court_favor.desc: Spend 8 wealth on gifts at court: influence +8, standing with House Ostren rises.
action.reconcile.title: Reconcile Kin
action.reconcile.desc: Spend 5 influence to mend a feud between two family members.
action.grant_estate.title: Grant an Estate
action.grant_estate.desc: Settle a claimant with land, founding a loyal branch house.
action.petition_rank.title: Petition for Rank
action.petition_rank.desc: Spend wealth and influence to petition for a higher rank.
action.settle_debt.title: Settle Debts
action.abdicate.title: Abdicate
action.abdicate.desc: Step down and pass the house to the next generation now.
reason.need_spare_estate: Requires an estate beyond the main hall.
reason.rank_at_top: The house already holds its highest rank.
reason.petition_used: A petition was already made this generation.
reason.too_early_abdicate: The council will not accept abdication before turn 8.
reason.head_too_young: The head is still too young to rule alone.
dlm.competing_heirs.title: Rival Heirs
dlm.competing_heirs.desc: {a} and {b} both press their claim to the succession, and the household splits behind them.
dlm.competing_heirs.pos.0: My claim is elder and stronger. Name me.
dlm.competing_heirs.pos.1: Ability should outweigh birth order. Choose me.
dlm.marriage_obligation.title: A Promised Marriage
dlm.marriage_obligation.desc: {house} demands the marriage owed to them, naming {child} as the price of past favor.
dlm.marriage_obligation.pos.0: Do not sell me to settle your debts.
dlm.branch_claim.title: A Claim Against the House
dlm.branch_claim.desc: {holder} presses a formal claim against the main line, citing old rights.
dlm.branch_claim.pos.0: What was taken from my line must be returned.
dlm.property_division.title: Division of the Estates
dlm.property_division.desc: {second} demands a share of the family lands, while {elder} insists the estates stay whole.
dlm.property_division.pos.0: The estates must pass whole, or the house weakens.
dlm.property_division.pos.1: I am owed land of my own, not a stipend.
dlm.regency_overreach.title: The Regent's Reach
dlm.regency_overreach.desc: Regent {regent} rules in the head's name, and the household wonders who truly commands.
dlm.regency_overreach.pos.0: I only guard the house until the head is ready.
dlm.disloyal_kin.title: A Disloyal Kinsman
dlm.disloyal_kin.desc: {kin} works against the head, and the household demands an answer.
dlm.disloyal_kin.pos.0: I owe this house nothing anymore.
dlm.exile_return.title: The Exile's Plea
dlm.exile_return.desc: {exile}, cast out in an earlier generation, petitions to return to the house.
dlm.exile_return.pos.0: Let me come home. My quarrel was with the dead, not the living.
dlm.rescue_house.title: The House in Peril
dlm.rescue_house.desc: Coffers empty and creditors circling, {house} offers to rescue the house — at a price.
dlm.rescue_house.pos.0: Aid now, and the house will owe us hereafter.
dlm.royal_levy.title: The Royal Levy
dlm.royal_levy.desc: The crown demands its due from a house of rank. Refusal will not be forgotten.
dlm.royal_levy.pos.0: Rank is privilege, and privilege is paid for.
dlm.recovery_offer.title: A Path Back
dlm.recovery_offer.desc: Fallen in rank, the house is offered a way to recover its standing.
dlm.recovery_offer.pos.0: Every fall can be climbed, if the price is borne.
dlm.legal_vs_emotional.title: Law Against Love
dlm.legal_vs_emotional.desc: By law {heir} stands first, yet the head's heart favors {beloved}.
dlm.legal_vs_emotional.pos.0: The law named me. Honor it.
dlm.legal_vs_emotional.pos.1: Am I worth less for being loved?
cause.competing_heirs: Two living claims of nearly equal weight
cause.branch_claim: An active claim of {holder} against the main line
cause.property_division: Two adult heirs and divisible estates
cause.regency: A regency over an underage head
cause.exile_return: An exile decreed by an earlier generation
cause.legal_vs_emotional: A declared heir against the head's affection
risk.rivalry_deepens: The rivalry between heirs will deepen.
risk.unresolved_claims: Both claims remain alive for the succession.
risk.lasting_resentment: The one given away will resent the head for years.
risk.house_grudge: The slighted house will remember this refusal.
risk.wealth_drain: The coffers will bear the cost.
risk.claim_persists: The claim survives, diminished but alive.
risk.branch_feud: The claimant's line may turn openly hostile.
risk.debt_grows: The promise adds to the house's debt.
risk.claims_harden: The refused claim will harden and grow.
risk.regent_power: The regent's grip on the house tightens.
risk.regent_resentment: The regent will not forget being curbed.
risk.young_rule: A young head rules alone, untested.
risk.disinherited_line: The disinherited line will remember for generations.
risk.exiled_return: The exile, or their heirs, may one day return.
risk.restored_rival: A restored claim re-enters the succession.
risk.outside_claim: The refused exile presses a claim from outside.
risk.obligation_due: The rescuer will one day collect the debt.
risk.rank_fall: The house risks falling in rank.
risk.kin_resentment: The kin sent to serve will resent it.
risk.spurned_heir: The lawful heir is spurned and will not forget.
risk.cold_duty: The beloved child is passed over.
choice.competing_heirs:back_elder.title: Back the Elder Claim
choice.competing_heirs:back_elder.desc: The stronger claim gains weight; the other heir loses loyalty.
choice.competing_heirs:back_second.title: Back the Rival
choice.competing_heirs:back_second.desc: The rival gains claim and ability; the elder grows jealous.
choice.competing_heirs:demand_peace.desc: Force the heirs to stand down; their bond improves.
choice.marriage_obligation:comply.title: Give the Marriage
choice.marriage_obligation:comply.desc: The debt is paid with a forced marriage; the child will resent it.
choice.marriage_obligation:refuse.title: Refuse the Demand
choice.marriage_obligation:refuse.desc: Standing with the house falls; the obligation dies with it.
choice.marriage_obligation:compensate.de: Silver settles what marriage was meant to.
choice.branch_claim:recognize.title: Recognize the Claim
choice.branch_claim:recognize.desc: The claim is honored; legitimacy suffers but old wounds close.
choice.branch_claim:buy_off.title: Buy the Claim Down (Wealth 15)
choice.branch_claim:buy_off.desc: Silver weakens the claim without settling it.
choice.branch_claim:reject.title: Reject the Claim
choice.branch_claim:reject.desc: The claim hardens and the claimant's resentment grows.
choice.property_division:divide.title: Divide the Estates
choice.property_division:divide.desc: The second heir founds a branch house with their own land.
A stipend is pledged; the debt of the house grows.
choice.property_division:refuse.title: Refuse Division
choice.property_division:refuse.desc: The estates stay whole; the passed-over heir hardens a claim.
choice.regency_overreach:yield.title: Yield Authority
choice.regency_overreach:yield.desc: The regent rules in practice; stability rises, the head's power wanes.
choice.regency_overreach:curb.title: Curb the Regent
choice.regency_overreach:curb.desc: The regent is checked and resents it.
choice.regency_overreach:end_regency.des: The head rules alone; legitimacy rises, stability dips.
choice.disloyal_kin:disinherit.title: Disinherit Them
choice.disloyal_kin:disinherit.desc: Their claim is struck out; the house remembers a disinheritance.
choice.disloyal_kin:exile.title: Exile Them
choice.disloyal_kin:exile.desc: They are cast from the house; the memory of exile endures.
choice.disloyal_kin:forgive.title: Forgive Them
choice.disloyal_kin:forgive.desc: Mercy restores some loyalty and cohesion.
choice.exile_return:allow.title: Allow the Return
choice.exile_return:allow.desc: The exile returns with a restored claim.
choice.exile_return:refuse.title: Refuse the Return
choice.exile_return:refuse.desc: The exile presses a claim from outside the walls.
choice.exile_return:restore_estate.title: Restore with an Estate
choice.exile_return:restore_estate.desc: The exile returns as a branch head with land of their own.
choice.rescue_house:accept.title: Accept the Rescue
choice.rescue_house:accept.desc: The house is saved and owes its rescuer hereafter.
choice.rescue_house:refuse.title: Refuse with Pride
choice.rescue_house:refuse.desc: Honor is kept; if the crisis continues, rank will fall.
choice.rescue_house:sell_estate.title: Sell an Estate
choice.rescue_house:sell_estate.desc: Land is sold to cover the debts.
choice.royal_levy:pay.title: Pay the Levy (Wealth 18)
choice.royal_levy:pay.desc: The crown is satisfied; standing at court rises.
choice.royal_levy:refuse.title: Refuse the Levy
choice.royal_levy:refuse.desc: The crown's disfavor will cost the house its rank.
choice.royal_levy:send_kin.title: Send Kin to Serve
choice.royal_levy:send_kin.desc: A family member serves in place of silver.
choice.recovery_offer:marry_patron.title: Marry into the Patron House
choice.recovery_offer:marry_patron.desc: A forced marriage buys back the house's rank.
choice.recovery_offer:tribute.title: Pay a Tribute (Wealth 20)
choice.recovery_offer:tribute.desc: A heavy payment restores the house's standing.
choice.recovery_offer:endure.title: Endure the Decline
choice.recovery_offer:endure.desc: The house waits, husbanding what remains.
choice.legal_vs_emotional:uphold_law.des: The declared heir stands; the beloved child envies.
The heirship changes hands; the spurned heir resents it.
choice.legal_vs_emotional:divide_duty.de: The heirship stands; the beloved is compensated.
memeffect.betrayal: Trust within the house is broken; the betrayed line acts against the head.
memeffect.exile: The exiled line waits beyond the walls, and may seek return.
memeffect.disinheritance: The disinherited line nurses its stricken claim.
memeffect.forced_marriage: The one given away carries resentment into the next generation.
memeffect.house_rescue: The rescuer holds an obligation over the house.
memeffect.rights_seized: The passed-over line holds a living claim on the succession.
memeffect.rights_restored: A restored line owes its standing to the head's justice.
succcause.age: the head died of old age
succcause.forced_removal: the council deposed a head without legitimacy
succcause.max_turns: the council forced an aged head to yield
succ.regent_line: {name} rules as regent until the head comes of age.
legresult.legacy_renowned_house.title: A Renowned House
legresult.legacy_renowned_house.desc: Three generations forged a name that will outlive them all.
legresult.legacy_firm_dynasty.title: A Firm Dynasty
legresult.legacy_firm_dynasty.desc: The house stands firm, its rights and lands secured for the heirs.
legresult.legacy_enduring_line.title: An Enduring Line
legresult.legacy_enduring_line.desc: Scarred but unbroken, the line carries on.
legresult.legacy_diminished_house.title: A Diminished House
legresult.legacy_diminished_house.desc: The name survives, but much was lost along the way.
legresult.legacy_broken_dynasty.title: A Broken Dynasty
legresult.legacy_broken_dynasty.desc: What the founder built, the heirs could not hold.
upcoming.camp_succession_window: Succession may come at any time: age, health, or decree
upcoming.camp_max_turns: The council forces succession at this turn
upcoming.camp_royal_levy: The royal levy awaits an answer
focus.camp_obligation: The house owes an unpaid obligation to {house}.
chron.camp_founded: {actor} holds House Arven as the campaign of three generations begins.
chron.camp_court_favor: {actor} courted favor at the royal court.
chron.camp_declare_heir: {actor} declared {heir} formal heir of the house.
chron.camp_grant_estate: {actor} granted {estate} to {kin}, founding a branch house.
chron.camp_settle_debt: {actor} repaid part of the house's debts.
chron.camp_abdicate: {actor} abdicated as head of the house.
chron.camp_marriage_forced: {actor} was given in marriage to {spouse} of {house}, unwilling.
chron.camp_quiet_turn: A quiet season passed over the house.
chron.camp_division_branch: {kin} received {estate} and founded a branch house.
chron.camp_division_refused: {actor} refused to divide the estates with {kin}.
chron.camp_regent_yield: {actor} took the reins of the house as regent.
chron.camp_exile_returned: {actor} returned from exile to the house.
chron.camp_exile_restored: {kin} returned from exile with {estate} and a branch of their own.
chron.camp_rescued: {house} rescued the house from ruin — for a price to be named.
chron.camp_rescue_refused: {actor} refused rescue and chose pride over safety.
chron.camp_endure_decline: {actor} chose to endure the house's decline.
chron.camp_uphold_law: {actor} upheld the law of succession for {heir}.
chron.camp_favor_beloved: {actor} set aside the law and named {beloved} heir.
chron.camp_divide_duty: {actor} divided duty from love with a settlement.
chron.camp_claim_seized: {actor} seized what was claimed, tired of waiting.
chron.camp_deposed: The council deposed {actor} for want of legitimacy.
chron.camp_council_forces_transfer: The council compelled the aged {actor} to yield the house.
chron.camp_distant_cousin: With no heir in the main line, distant cousin {actor} claimed the house.
chron.camp_succ_camp_stable: {actor} succeeded as head in an orderly succession.
chron.camp_succ_camp_uneasy: {actor} took the house amid muttering kin.
chron.camp_succ_camp_disputed: {actor} seized the succession over open dispute.
chron.camp_succ_camp_regency: The child {actor} inherited under a regency.
chron.camp_regency_begins: {actor} began a regency for the young {ward}.
chron.camp_new_generation: Generation {generation} of House Arven begins under {actor}.
chron.camp_legacy_legacy_renowned_house: The dynasty closed its third generation as a renowned house.
chron.camp_legacy_legacy_firm_dynasty: The dynasty closed its third generation standing firm.
chron.camp_legacy_legacy_enduring_line: The dynasty closed its third generation scarred but unbroken.
chron.camp_legacy_legacy_diminished_hous: The dynasty closed its third generation diminished.
chron.camp_legacy_legacy_broken_dynasty: The dynasty closed its third generation broken.
